title: Bundaberg, Queensland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Bundaberg is a city in Queensland with a population of 73,747. Queensland’s rum and ginger beer capital with the Southern Great Barrier Reef and turtle nesting beaches.
